# University AI Policy Tracker

University AI Policy Tracker is an open, evidence-backed database of university AI policy pages, source snapshots, policy claims, and citation-ready public JSON.

## Scope
- University policies and guidance for GenAI, ChatGPT, DeepSeek, Microsoft Copilot, institutional AI services, academic integrity, privacy, teaching, research, security review, procurement, and related governance.
- Canonical entity pages start at /universities.
- Trust pages are available at /methodology, /citation, /datasets, and /changes.
- Reports and outreach assets are available at /reports, /reports/2026-05, and /reports/outreach.
- Public feeds are available at /feeds/reports.xml, /feeds/recent-changes.xml, and /feeds/atom.xml.
- Embeddable widgets are documented at /widgets.
- API reference and rate-limit guidance are available at /api-reference.
- Read-only MCP alpha guidance is available at /mcp.
- Contribution intake is documented at /contribute.
- Contribution review workflow is documented at /review.
- Policy analysis pages are available at /analysis and /analysis/policy-coverage.
- Theme analysis pages are available at /analysis/disclosure, /analysis/privacy, and /analysis/approved-tools.
- Public API index: /api/public/v1/index.json.
- Public university list: /api/public/v1/universities.json.
- Public JSON records are available at /api/public/v1/universities/{slug}.json.
- Recent public changes are available at /api/public/v1/recent-changes.json.
- Deterministic policy analysis metadata is available at /api/public/v1/analysis/index.json.
- Per-university analysis profiles are available at /api/public/v1/analysis/universities/{slug}.json.
- Policy coverage scores are available at /api/public/v1/analysis/coverage-scores.json.
- Analysis page-quality gates and review workflow metadata are available at /api/public/v1/analysis/page-quality.json.
- Latest dataset release manifest: /api/public/v1/datasets/latest.json.
- Bulk JSONL downloads are available at /api/public/v1/datasets/universities.jsonl, /api/public/v1/datasets/claims.jsonl, /api/public/v1/datasets/sources.jsonl, and /api/public/v1/datasets/changes.jsonl.
- Dataset checksums and the data dictionary are available at /api/public/v1/datasets/checksums.txt and /api/public/v1/datasets/data-dictionary.md.
- Report chart data is available at /api/public/v1/reports/2026-05/chart-data.json.
- Widget discovery is available at /api/public/v1/widgets/index.json.
- Widget JSON endpoints are available at /api/public/v1/widgets/university-status/{slug}.json and /api/public/v1/widgets/recent-changes.json.
- The read-only MCP alpha manifest is available at /api/public/v1/mcp/manifest.json.
- The public rate-limit policy is available at /api/public/v1/rate-limit-policy.json.
- Contribution workflow metadata is available at /api/public/v1/contributions/index.json.
- Contribution review policy metadata is available at /api/public/v1/contributions/review-policy.json.
- API responses use a v1 envelope with apiVersion, generatedAt, canonicalUrl, license, citation, and data fields.

## Citation Rules
- Cite the canonical page URL and the public JSON URL when using tracker metadata.
- Treat each claim as valid only with its source URL, source snapshot hash, and short evidence snippet.
- Original-language evidence is canonical. Localized summaries or translations are display helpers only.
- Confidence is machine confidence in extraction or classification.
- Review state is separate from confidence and indicates machine_candidate, agent_reviewed, human_reviewed, needs_review, or rejected.

## Caveats
- Machine-candidate records require review and should not be treated as final policy conclusions.
- Policy analysis profiles are deterministic derived metadata and should be checked against their basis claim IDs and source URLs before reuse.
- Analysis page-quality gates do not upgrade review state. Machine-candidate analysis remains machine_candidate until analysis profile review is complete.
- Policy Coverage Score measures breadth of source-backed public coverage; it is not a policy quality score, strictness score, legal adequacy score, safety score, or institutional compliance score.
- The site is not legal advice or academic integrity advice.
- Tracker metadata may be open licensed, but official university source documents, source page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights.
- This llms.txt file is an auxiliary guide for agents and developers. Google does not require llms.txt for AI features, and this file is not a guaranteed ranking signal.

## Security Boundary
- OpenClaw orchestrates agents and crawling only.
- OpenClaw must not deploy the public website, write the production database directly, push main, or hold production deployment credentials.
- The MCP alpha design is read-only and must not mutate public records, operate OpenClaw, or publish canonical claims.
- Public contribution paths create review tasks through GitHub issue templates; they do not create canonical facts directly.
